ground_truth.title: How to Provide Effective Feedback On Video Projects - Dropbox
ground_truth.main_content: Effective feedback can keep a video project on track and result in a more polished final output. When reviewing video projects, provide specific, actionable feedback that helps creators understand exactly what changes are needed. Use timestamps to reference exact moments in the video, making it easier for editors to locate and address issues. Frame your comments constructively, focusing on how improvements can be made rather than simply pointing out problems. Clear and consistent feedback helps maintain the creative vision while ensuring technical quality meets standards.

Clear and consistent feedback helps maintain the creative vision while ensuring technical quality meets standards.
